Wurmscale Fistwraps  
 

No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: Hand to Hand Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 14 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +10 HP: +75
SV FIRE: +20 SV MAGIC: +5
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: MNK BST
Race: HUM BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

▲ Page top
This is a monk item
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2001 at 5:07 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250166807
Scholar
69 posts
Well, they're fistwraps that go into your weapon slot. And with a decent haste item and your friendly neighborhood bard, your ratio is easily better than 1:1.
If you're a monk, obtaining these fistwraps will instantly set you far apart from your peers.

#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 10 2001 at 5:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Obviously if you hadnt noticed this is the upgrade to Jade Mace. More dmg,saves,hp,sta and less weight......this is the upgrade to Jade Mace by far.
